Explanation: The AZA Aquatic Invertebrate Taxon Advisory Group, in association with the AZA Animal Welfare Committee, published a care manual specifically for the Japanese Spider Crab (Macrocheira kaempferi), matching the advisory group/animal welfare clue [86987]. A project to produce and release large numbers of offspring in Asia, capture of 162 ovigerous females, and environmental requirements (temperature, light, vibration, air quality) are all documented for Macrocheira kaempferi [99136]. All clues align with this species.
Exact Answer: Macrocheira kaempferi (Japanese Spider Crab)
Confidence: 100%
